query:
-- marketplace_profiles: cross-tenant assessors and panel beaters
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS marketplace_profiles (
  id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT (UUID()),
  type ENUM('assessor','panel_beater') NOT NULL,
  company_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  country_id VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  platform_status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  contact_email VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  contact_phone VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  description TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  INDEX idx_mp_type (type),
  INDEX idx_mp_status (platform_status),
  INDEX idx_mp_country (country_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- insurer_marketplace_relationships: SLA-based insurer ↔ provider links
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS insurer_marketplace_relationships (
  id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  insurer_tenant_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  marketplace_profile_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  relationship_status ENUM('approved','suspended','blacklisted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'approved',
  sla_signed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  preferred TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_insurer_profile (insurer_tenant_id, marketplace_profile_id),
  INDEX idx_imr_tenant (insurer_tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_imr_profile (marketplace_profile_id),
  INDEX idx_imr_status (relationship_status),
  CONSTRAINT fk_imr_profile FOREIGN KEY (marketplace_profile_id) REFERENCES marketplace_profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
